catalog.title: Quality criteria catalog
catalog.subtitle: Criteria published by the quality lead — read-only.

checklist.intro: Check each criterion when the report meets the rule for this review.
checklist.emptyManager: No criteria distributed to this report yet. Distribute them from quality administration.
checklist.emptyReader: No active criteria on this report yet.

admin.title: Criteria administration
admin.subtitle: Define, publish, and distribute quality rules (global quality checker role).

distributeReport.title: Distribute to a report
distributeReport.hint: Enables checkboxes on the chosen draft (Criteria tab in review).
distributeReport.noDrafts: No report drafts available for your teams.

deleteConfirm.title: Confirm deletion
deleteConfirm.message: Delete “{{label}}”? Related distributions and checks will be removed.

errors.targetTypes: Select at least one target type.
errors.distribute: Choose a criterion and a draft ID.
